summary: Critical: workflow references fixture files (./fixtures/{basic,multi-label,priority,wildcard}-config.json) not provided in deliverable—act execution will fail at config file reads (Invoke-PrLabelAssigner.ps1 line ~45 Test-Path check). PowerShell missing Set-StrictMode -Version Latest; no explicit -ErrorAction Stop on ConvertFrom-Json (line ~46) or Get-Content (line ~42). Test assertions in run-tests.sh are brittle—exact string matching on output formatting (e.g., lines 85-105) breaks if spacing/format changes. Workflow references Invoke-PrLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1 (line 10) but excluded from deliverable per spec—correct per instructions, but fixture data files should not be excluded. Script logic is sound and readable; issue is incomplete/non-runnable deliverable for stated act pipeline context.
